2_shell_metric.definition: Euclidean L2 distance between shell centroids in R^3

v2.definition: n=1: 1; n=2: phi^-2; n=3: phi^-3; n>3: phi^-3 [C] fallback

v3.definition: epsilon_n = 4^{-n} = 1/M_n^sep [C] convention; M_n^sep = 4^n (Energiedoku §7); no explicit theorem in §8

5_definition_of_sep_n.definition: Minimum pairwise Euclidean distance between shell centroids at level n

7_rule_for_extracting_first_loss_index_n.definition: Smallest ascending n where shell_separation_loss(sep(n), epsilon_n) is true
7_rule_for_extracting_first_loss_index_n.awaiting: Observed n_0 from canonical run with ShellSeparationLoss(n) = true

negative_rule.en: No prime index, EABC channel count, residue signal, or arithmetic feature may be used to choose the shell model, shell metric, threshold rule epsilon_n, search range, separation statistic, or first-loss index n_0.
de_merksaetze: Erst danach: Trifft n_0 einen EABC-Primindex?

arithmetic_test.shellPrimeMatchAtFirstLoss: INACTIVE until n_0 fixed without prime-index reference

dual_track_governance.negative_rule: n_0 from Track B MUST NOT be used for shellPrimeMatchAtFirstLoss while Track A remains primary frozen construction

track_a_canonical.gate_eligible_note: Eligible only after observed n_0 under this frozen track; not yet satisfied
track_a_canonical.label: primary frozen construction

track_b_energiedoku_full.first_loss_n_note: Under theorematic_energiedoku_v1 only; sep(2) = phi^-2 = epsilon_2 (boundary equality)
track_b_energiedoku_full.gate_eligible_note: Does NOT activate E-085 while Track A remains primary
track_b_energiedoku_full.label: [C] exploratory reference

B1_track_switch.description: New pre-registration freezing energiedoku_full as sole primary construction

B2_unified_bridge.description: Documented interpretive ι_n for n<=3; prefix compatibility [A]; no global bijection

B3_track_a_loss.description: Observed n_0 from Track A under frozen canonical pre-reg
